Order Service (Port 8087)
========================

ORDERS
------

POST /order
  Create an order (fetches product details from Product Service)
  Request:
  {
    "userId": "UUID (required)",
    "productId": "UUID (required)",
    "currency": "string (required, 3 chars — USD, EUR, etc.)"
  }
  Response 201:
  {
    "id": "UUID (auto-generated)",
    "userId": "UUID",
    "productId": "UUID",
    "productTitle": "string (from product service)",
    "status": "CREATED",
    "totalAmount": "number (price from product service)",
    "currency": "string",
    "createdAt": "ISO timestamp",
    "updatedAt": "ISO timestamp"
  }
  Error 404: { "message": "string" (product not found) }

GET /order/{orderId}
  Get order state (orderId is UUID)
  Response 200: (same as above)
  Error 404: { "message": "string" }

PUT /order/{orderId}/status (orderId is UUID)
  Transition order status (CREATED -> SHIPPED / DELIVERED / CANCELLED)
  Request:
  {
    "status": "string (required — SHIPPED, DELIVERED, or CANCELLED)"
  }
  Response 200: (order object)
  Error 404: { "message": "string" }
  Error 409: { "message": "string" }

GET /order/user/{userId}
  List orders by user
  Response 200: [ ... array of order objects ]

PUT /order/{orderId}/paid
  Mark order as paid (called by payment service)
  Response 200: (order object)
  Sends payment confirmation email to user.
  Error 404: { "message": "string" }

POST /order/{orderId}/refund
  Refund order (orchestrated flow)
  1. Calls payment service to process refund
  2. Marks order as REFUNDED
  3. Sends refund confirmation email to user
  Response 200: (order object with status REFUNDED)
  Error 404: { "message": "string" }

PUT /order/{orderId}/refunded
  Mark order as refunded (called by payment service)
  Response 200: (order object)
  Sends refund confirmation email to user.
  Error 404: { "message": "string" }

DEPENDENCIES
------------
- Product Service: http://product-service:8082
- Payment Service: http://payment-service:8080
- User Service: http://user-service:8080
- Email Service: http://notification-service:8080
